---
title: "price_trends"
author: "Abigail Wong"
date: "2026-05-02"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
yearly_data <- read.csv("/Users/abigailwong/Desktop/ddsc_spring/CASTHPI_yearly_cleaned.csv")

glimpse(yearly_data)

#HPI = House Price Index

ggplot(yearly_data, aes(x = Year, y = Yearly_Average_HPI)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "lightblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 920)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Yearly Average HPI",
    fill = "Yearly_Average_HPI",
    title = "Yearly Average HPI between 1984 and 2023",
  )


ggplot(yearly_data, aes(x = Year, y = Lowest_Quarterly_HPI)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "coral") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 920)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year", 
    y = "Lowest Quarterly HPI",
    fill = "Lowest_Quarterly_HPI",
    title = "Lowest Quarterly HPI between 1984 and 2023"
  )


ggplot(yearly_data, aes(x = Year, y = Highest_Quarterly_HPI)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkseagreen") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 920)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Year", 
    y = "Higheset Quarterly HPI",
    fill = "Highest_Quarterly_HPI",
    title = "Highest Quarterly HPI between 1984 and 2023"
  )
```
